config.description: Autonomous agent that ports a CUDA/GPU PyTorch model to a native torch_neuronx port on AWS Trainium (native-PyTorch style) — the model's own editable definition (dev mode) or a feature-extractor subgraph (integration mode). Phase A freezes a CPU/CUDA reference oracle (inference + one backprop); Phase B ports, compiles, and validates the Trainium run against that oracle (>= 0.99 cosine), then ships parity notebooks for inference, backprop, and (dev mode) multi-step on-device training.
